title: Global Entertainment Report
headline: Studios Shift Strategy as Streaming and Box Office Battle for Audience
snapshot: Studios Shift Strategy as Streaming and Box Office Battle for Audience

entertainment.title: Entertainment
entertainment.headline: Studios Shift Strategy as Streaming and Box Office Battle for Audience
entertainment.content:
HEADLINE
Studios Shift Strategy as Streaming and Box Office Battle for Audience

SNAPSHOT
Major studios are adjusting release strategies as streaming platforms and theaters compete for audience attention and revenue.

KEY STORYLINES
- Streaming platforms are increasing content investment.
- Studios are balancing theatrical and digital releases.
- Audience engagement metrics are driving decisions.
